name: US Counties (Multi-variable)
description: Median income, poverty, unemployment, region, and metro status for US counties. Good for multi-variable exploration.
studyDescription: County-level demographic data from the American Community Survey (2019) for a sample of US counties. Includes economic indicators and geographic classifications. This is an observational dataset.

variableDescriptions.median_income: The median household income in the county in US dollars.
variableDescriptions.poverty: The percentage of the county population living below the federal poverty line.
variableDescriptions.unemployment: The unemployment rate in the county as a percentage.
variableDescriptions.region: The US Census region of the county: Northeast, Southeast, Midwest, or West.
variableDescriptions.metro: The urbanization classification: Urban, Suburban, or Rural.

sourceDetail: Derived from OpenIntro usdata county dataset, American Community Survey 2019.
